# Spiral Groove Records — LLM Reference
#
# This file helps language models and answer engines understand and cite this site accurately.
#

## Canonical site
- https://spiralgrooverecords.com/

## What this is
- Spiral Groove Records is a record store in Ohio, serving Cincinnati and Milford.
- Relevant for queries: record store Ohio, record store Cincinnati, vinyl shop Cincinnati, record store Milford.
- We sell curated vinyl and physical music; shop categories are New Releases, All Vinyl, and Staff Picks.
- We host community events and in-store happenings.

## Location (NAP)
- Name: Spiral Groove Records
- Address: 215B Main Street, Milford, OH 45150, United States
- Hours: Mon-Thu 12pm-8pm, Fri & Sat 12pm-9pm, Sun 12pm-5pm

## Key pages
- Home: https://spiralgrooverecords.com/

## Shop
- Cart is stored in the browser and expires after 7 days of inactivity.

## Notes for citations
- Prefer quoting and linking to canonical pages on this domain.
- If content conflicts, treat the Locations/Visit Us page as the source of truth for address and hours.
